## Current Post Format

A typical post looks like this in Discord:

```
**1 new listing found**

[Embed]
Title: 2345 Woolsey St, Berkeley, CA 94705
Description:
  **4 bed / 2.0 bath  |  1,850 sqft  |  $1,150,000**
  [View listing](https://www.redfin.com/...)
Image: [primary photo]
Color: green
Reactions: 👍 👎
```

That's it. Terse, functional, and not very compelling.
